### 3.2 Failing Test ‚Äî ‚úÖ FIXED

**`test_hierarchy.py::test_folder_crud`** ‚Äî **PASSED**

**Remediation:** Refactored `db.delete_folder()` to re-parent child folders and sources to `NULL` (workspace root) instead of performing a recursive delete. This ensures no data is accidentally wiped when a parent folder is removed.

## 4. DRY / SOLID Compliance

### 4.1 Complexity Hotspot ‚Äî ‚úÖ RESOLVED

`metadata_extractor.py::extract_log_metadata` (complexity: 39) has been decomposed into focused sub-functions:
- `_extract_base_metadata()`
- `_extract_heuristic_facets()`
- `_extract_context_facets()`
- `_extract_kv_facets()`
- `_apply_custom_extractions()`

### 4.2 SOLID Violations ‚Äî ‚úÖ RESOLVED

| Principle | Location | Status | Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|
| **OCP** | `api.py:194` | ‚úÖ **RESOLVED** | Moved host resolution to `AIProviderFactory` configuration map. |
| **SRP** | `metadata_extractor.py` | ‚úÖ **RESOLVED** | Decomposed monolithic extractor. |
| **SRP** | `ai/ai_studio.py` | ‚úÖ **RESOLVED** | Extracted helper methods for ADK session/history management. |

### 4.3 Debug Statements in Production ‚Äî ‚úÖ RESOLVED

- `print()` calls in `openai_compatible.py` replaced with `logger`.
- `console.log` calls in frontend stores and hooks removed.

## 8. Proposed New Features to Consider

> Derived from gap analysis, architectural headroom, and usage patterns.

| # | Feature | Rationale | Complexity |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Live Coverage Dashboard** | The MCP server already exposes tools ‚Äî surface test coverage % in a sidebar badge per sprint | Low |
| 2 | **SSH Key-based Authentication** | `ssh_loader.py` only supports password auth; key-based SSH is standard for production servers | Medium |
| 3 | **OpenAI-Compatible Provider UI** | `openai_compatible.py` exists but has no Settings UI to configure host/API key for LM Studio, Groq, etc. | Low |
| 4 | **Folder-Level AI Context Scoping** | AI chat sessions could inherit context from a folder (e.g., "analyze all sources in /production") | High |
| 5 | **Log Retention / TTL Policy** | No mechanism to purge old logs from DuckDB ‚Äî production servers will accumulate GB-level data | Medium |
| 6 | **FUSION-DEBT-01: Automatic Clock Drift Compensation** | Detect common log events across sources and automatically compute relative time offsets | High |
| 7 | **Export to Splunk / Elastic / Loki Format** | Current export is CSV/JSON; structured export to observability platform formats would widen the audience | Medium |
| 8 | **Source Health Indicators** | Show a visual indicator per source (last ingested timestamp, tail status, error count) in the sidebar | Low |
